title: DDL Atomicity Verification
description: 证明DDL操作的原子性：所有或无操作，提交的模式始终反映已提交表的并集，无表出现在没有相应CREATE日志条目的模式中，回滚始终清除catalogBuffer，已提交模式中看不到部分DDL状态。

verified_properties: Committed schema always reflects the union of committed tables
No table appears in schema without a corresponding CREATE log entry
No partial DDL state visible in committed schema

author: openclaw
